title: gaultheria dumicola
intro: Gaultheria dumicola, also known as Mountain Wintergreen, is a plant species belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant is rich in methyl salicylate, a compound with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Gaultheria dumicola are used to treat various health issues, including headaches, fever, and sore muscles, due to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Gaultheria dumicola is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its health benefits.
